page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.12xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor with an x86_64 architecture. The processor operates at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of threads per core, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 96 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage must be provisioned via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer for distributed workloads.

The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance highly cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. However, the lack of local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, rendering it unsuitable for large-scale database hosting or deep learning acceleration. It is optimized for high-compute tasks such as batch processing, scientific modeling, video encoding, and compute-intensive web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 48 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 architecture instance provides a dedicated CPU allocation with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. It is configured with 96 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware. This resource profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for compute-heavy workloads that require high CPU density without large memory footprints. It is best suited for batch processing, scientific simulations, and compute-intensive web serving.

tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a balanced network interface for intensive processing workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.25 GHz AMD EPYC 9T95 processor with 48 dedicated physical cores.
Configured with 96 GB of system memory, offering a 2.0 GB per core ratio.
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps for efficient data transfer.
Features a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio with no hyperthreading overhead.
Requires network-attached block storage as no local storage is bundled.
Optimized for batch processing, scientific modeling, and compute-heavy web serving.
